GenAiPlugin.description: Sends an instant WhatsApp compliance report to the field rep's mobile number. The report includes brand visibility score, shelf share percentage, missing SKUs list, competitor products detected, and the top 5 recommended actions — allowing reps to review results before leaving the store.

pluginFunctions.description: Sends a formatted shelf audit compliance report via WhatsApp to the rep's phone number.

parameters.description: The Salesforce ID of the completed ShelfAudit__c record
The rep's WhatsApp-enabled phone number with country code (e.g. +14155552671)
